description: Digitize a 'Big Picture' Event Storming workshop from the text transcript at ~/Desktop/storming_transcript.txt into the diagram file ~/Diagrams/library_event_storming.drawio. Create the process flow from left to right using rectangle shapes with exact text labels and the specific hex colors defined in the transcript's Legend (e.g., Domain Events must be #FF9900). Connect the shapes with arrows to show the flow. Export the completed diagram as a PNG image to ~/Diagrams/exports/library_event_storming.png. Verification depends on the application of correct hex codes to the corresponding text labels.
